changelog: Fixed critical gap-expiry bug: cold_start_gap block now correctly clears after 1 hour (was permanently stuck)
Added elapsed_bars_since_open() to SessionManager — uncapped bar counter for gap expiry
Raised rsi_buy_max 78->80: standard overbought threshold, prevents false-positive filtering of high-confidence signals
Wired ML decision log to dashboard: TradingLoop now records every ML blend decision and publishes to live panel
Fixed Header sentiment crowd badge: was comparing dict object to string — badge was permanently invisible
Fixed REST calls/min: was hardcoded 0 in snapshot, now uses RestApiBudget.calls_last_minute()
Fixed /api/system: now returns caffeinate, uptime, ohlc_markets_cached, sessions_passed for SystemPanel
Fixed shadow_today top_blocked_setup: was always unknown due to empty-key rows; added top_3_setups
Fixed estimated_extra_if_threshold_minus_5: was counting all blocked signals (5492); now correctly 459
Added snapshot enrichment: model_version, last_retrain_time, uptime, position_sync_status for SystemPanel
Disabled Germany 40 (DAX): IX.D.DAX.IFM.IP delivers no data on demo account
Added AGENT_CHANGES.md: permanent append-only record of every code change
Added tests/test_deployed_fixes.py: 20 regression tests verifying every fix is present in live code
